rulings.Case Title: IN RE MARRIAGE OF WILLIAM JOHN MURRAY
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF MARRIAGE
rulings.Rulings: hearing. appearance required to discuss whether petitioner can properly bring this petition on behalf of her mother. another order must be provided, as the order submitted has the wrong person listed as petitioner (lists the mother, when the daughter is the petitioner). in addition, petitioner may be asked whether she has been appointed under a durable power of attorney for finances to act for her mother.
